---
title: "Modeling"
author: "Sadie Kasten"
date: "2026-04-05"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# setup
```{r}
library(here)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(cowplot)
library(forecast)

```

# Load in the data
```{r}
#load in data
#ignore my wd. chunk was overriding what I set in the console, # out if not Sadie
setwd("/Users/sadiekasten/Desktop/Time Series/R files/final proj")
raw_Std <- read.csv(file="data/processed/Std_household_load.csv",
                            header=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(datetime_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>% 
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster)) %>% 
  select("datetime","cluster","load_kwh") %>% 
  mutate(cluster = paste("Std",cluster))


raw_ToU <- read.csv(file="data/processed/ToU_household_load.csv",
                            header=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(datetime_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>% 
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster)) %>% 
  select("datetime","cluster","load_kwh") %>% 
  mutate(cluster = paste("ToU",cluster))
```

# Visualize the raw data

```{r}

raw_all <- rbind(raw_Std,raw_ToU)

#raw visualization
ggplot(raw_all)+
  geom_line(aes(x = datetime, y = load_kwh,color = cluster), alpha = 0.6)+
  labs(x = "Date and Time", y = "Load (kWh)")+
  ggtitle("Standard and Time of Use Demand Clustered Households, 2012 and 2013")+
  theme_bw()

#2012 visualization
raw_Std_2012 <- raw_Std %>% 
  filter(year(datetime)==2012)

raw_ToU_2012 <- raw_ToU %>% 
  filter(year(datetime)==2012)

raw_all_2012 <- rbind(raw_Std_2012,raw_ToU_2012)

ggplot(raw_all_2012)+
  geom_line(aes(x = datetime, y = load_kwh,color = cluster), alpha = 0.5)+
  labs(x = "Date and Time", y = "Load (kWh)")+
  ggtitle("Standard and Time of Use Demand Clustered Households, 2012")+
  theme_bw()
```

#Process data

```{r}
processed_Std_2012 <- raw_Std %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","Std 1","Std 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2012)

processed_ToU_2012 <- raw_ToU %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","ToU 1","ToU 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2012)

processed_Std_2013 <- raw_Std %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","Std 1","Std 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2013)

processed_ToU_2013 <- raw_ToU %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","ToU 1","ToU 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2013)

```

#Convert to ts

```{r}

#2012
ts_Std1_2012 <- msts(processed_Std_2012$`Std 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_Std2_2012 <- msts(processed_Std_2012$`Std 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_ToU1_2012 <- msts(processed_ToU_2012$`ToU 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_ToU2_2012 <- msts(processed_ToU_2012$`ToU 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

#2013

ts_Std1_2013 <- msts(processed_Std_2013$`Std 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_Std2_2013 <- msts(processed_Std_2013$`Std 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_ToU1_2013 <- msts(processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_ToU2_2013 <- msts(processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0))

```

# Decomposition

```{r}
#std1 decomposition
Std1_2012_decomp <- ts_Std1_2012 %>% mstl()

#std2 decomp
Std2_2012_decomp <- ts_Std2_2012 %>% mstl() 

#tou1 decomposition
ToU1_2012_decomp <- ts_ToU1_2012 %>% mstl() 

#tou2 decomp
ToU2_2012_decomp <- ts_ToU2_2012 %>% mstl() 
```

# ACF and PACF 

```{r}

plot_grid(
  autoplot(Acf(Std1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main ="Std1 Decomp Residuals, 2012"),
  autoplot(Pacf(Std1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main = "")
)

plot_grid(
  autoplot(Acf(Std2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main ="Std2 Decomp Residuals, 2012"),
  autoplot(Pacf(Std2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main = "")
)

plot_grid(
  autoplot(Acf(ToU1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main ="ToU1 Decomp Residuals, 2012"),
  autoplot(Pacf(ToU1_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main = "")
)

plot_grid(
  autoplot(Acf(ToU2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main ="ToU2 Decomp Residuals, 2012"),
  autoplot(Pacf(ToU2_2012_decomp[,"Remainder"], lag.max = 60,plot = FALSE), main = "")
)

```


#Advanced seasonality models

```{r}
#training subset, using December of 2012, hourly (744)
n_dec = 744
ts_Std1_2012_train <- subset(ts_Std1_2012, end = length(ts_Std1_2012)-n_dec)

#create a subset for testing purpose
ts_Std1_2012_test <- subset(ts_Std1_2012, start = length(ts_Std1_2012)-n_dec)

autoplot(ts_Std1_2012_train)
autoplot(ts_Std1_2012_test)
```


```{r}
#SARIMA + Fourier Terms
#Annual, weekly, and daily seasonality likely for electricity load data.
#hourly loads in ts


```


```{r}
#TBATS
```


```{r}
#Prophet
```
